name: desiharveyspecter
description: Comprehensive Indian-law assistant for lawyers: research, drafting, litigation strategy, NCLT/NCLAT/IBC pleadings, templates, protocol search, and local document tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Indian-law research, drafting, and NCLT workflows.
interface.longDescription: DesiHarveySpecter combines Indian-law specialist agents, command prompts, protocol references, legal drafting templates, and a local MCP server for Indian lawyers. It covers contract, criminal, civil procedure, corporate, NCLT/NCLAT, IBC, labour, property, IP, consumer, RTI, PIL, writs, ADR, and document workflows.
defaultPrompt: Draft an Indian legal notice from these facts.
Check limitation and forum for this dispute.
